assumptions: measurements refreshed not later than T_meas + J_meas
class inputs are in declared enum ranges
automata.name: A_CH

assumptions: MAC/SDN provides admissible waveform and pilot configuration
guarantees: waveform W is a variable, not a location
automata.name: A_SIG

assumptions: beam commands and SSB/PRS configuration are finite and admissible
guarantees: recovery outcome no later than c_rec == D_BM
no c_rec > D_BM transition under BeamRecover invariant
automata.name: A_BM

clocks.meaning: local Age of Sensing at BS
clocks.name: aos_bs

assumptions: continuous estimator values are classified before UPPAAL
env.name: ENV_CH

assumptions: target presence and blockage are abstract finite classes
env.name: ENV_TARGET

assumptions: MAC/SDN commands are admissible in closed-system smoke mode
env.name: ENV_MAC

assumptions: report delivery is bounded by network abstraction
env.name: ENV_NET

A_BM.assumption: Команды луча и SSB/PRS-конфигурации конечны; beam_cmd? доставляется за D_cmd .
A_BM.guarantee: beam_report! публикуется в каждом окне; misalignment порождает beam_misaligned! за D_BM ; неуспешное recovery при c_rec=D_BM порождает beam_failure!.

A_CH.assumption: Measurements P_r,I_c, _tau,f_D,SINR_c обновляются не реже T_meas ; estimator возвращает конечные классы.
A_CH.guarantee: За D_meas после measure_tick? публикуется channel_report!; ChannelClass выбирается по приоритету _CH .

A_PH.assumption: Все дочерние отчеты доставляются за D_child ; clocks aos_bs , aos_ctrl корректно сбрасываются.
A_PH.guarantee: За D_report после деградации публикуется phy_kpi_report!; агрегированное состояние отражает communication и sensing classes.

A_SIG.assumption: MAC/SDN задают допустимые W, _p,MCS, _DRT, _cs, _ps , а estimator возвращает PilotDensityClass, DRTClass и PayloadSenseClass.
A_SIG.guarantee: За D_sig после конфигурационной команды публикуется signal_report!; нарушение DRT или BLER переводит автомат в SignalLimited.

A_SQ.assumption: На вход поступают свежие channel_report?, signal_report? и beam_report?.
A_SQ.guarantee: За D_sense публикуется sensing_report!; SensingState выбирается по приоритету _SQ .

transitions.statement: Any -- beam_cmd? / BeamClass := SEARCH, c_ssb := 0 --> BeamSearch
BeamSearch -- target_detected? / target_seen := true --> BeamSearchSeen
BeamSearchSeen -- PRSClass != FAILED sync: beam_report! update: BeamClass := TRACK --> BeamTrack
BeamTrack -- BeamErrorClass == LOCKABLE sync: beam_report! update: BeamClass := LOCKED --> BeamLock
BeamTrack -- AccClass == FAILED || BeamErrorClass == CRITICAL sync: beam_report! update: BeamClass := MISALIGNED, beam_degraded_flag := true --> BeamMisalign
BeamLock -- MisClass == OK sync: beam_report! update: BeamClass := LOCKED --> BeamLock
BeamLock -- MisClass == WARN || BlockageClass == SUSPECTED sync: beam_report! update: BeamClass := PREDICT --> BeamPredict
BeamPredict -- extra_ssb_cmd? / c_rec := 0 --> BeamRecoveryStart
BeamRecoveryStart -- recovery_start! update: BeamClass := RECOVERING --> BeamRecover
BeamMisalign -- beam_misaligned! --> BeamRecoveryStart
BeamRecover -- BeamErrorClass == LOCKABLE c_rec <= D_BM sync: beam_restored! update: BeamClass := LOCKED --> BeamLock
BeamRecover -- BlockageClass == CONFIRMED c_rec <= D_BM sync: handover_hint! update: BeamClass := HO_ASSIST --> BeamHOAssist

transitions.guard: c_rec == D_BM BeamErrorClass != LOCKABLE BlockageClass != CONFIRMED
transitions.statement: BeamRecover -- c_rec == D_BM BeamErrorClass != LOCKABLE BlockageClass != CONFIRMED sync: beam_failure! update: BeamClass := FAILED --> BeamFailed
BeamHOAssist -- new_beam_confirmed? / BeamClass := TRACK --> BeamTrack
BeamFailed -- recovery_cmd? / BeamClass := RECOVERING, c_rec := 0 --> BeamRecover
Any -- measure_tick? / c_meas := 0 --> MeasurePending
MeasurePending -- guard: ChannelClass' == NOMINAL sync: channel_report! update: ChannelClass := NOMINAL, channel_degraded_flag := false, c_meas := 0 --> ChannelNominal
MeasurePending -- guard: ChannelClass' == INTERFERENCE_LIMITED sync: channel_report! update: ChannelClass := INTERFERENCE_LIMITED, channel_degraded_flag := true, c_meas := 0 --> InterferenceLimited
MeasurePending -- guard: ChannelClass' == MOBILITY_LIMITED sync: channel_report! update: ChannelClass := MOBILITY_LIMITED, channel_degraded_flag := true, c_meas := 0 --> MobilityLimited
MeasurePending -- guard: ChannelClass' == MULTIPATH_LIMITED sync: channel_report! update: ChannelClass := MULTIPATH_LIMITED, channel_degraded_flag := true, c_meas := 0 --> MultipathLimited
MeasurePending -- guard: ChannelClass' == BLOCKAGE sync: channel_report! update: ChannelClass := BLOCKAGE, channel_degraded_flag := true, c_meas := 0 --> Blockage
MeasurePending -- guard: ChannelClass' == OUTAGE sync: channel_report! update: ChannelClass := OUTAGE, channel_degraded_flag := true, c_meas := 0 --> Outage
Any -- channel_report? / child_update := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYKpiReporting
Any -- signal_report? / child_update := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYKpiReporting
Any -- beam_report? / child_update := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYKpiReporting
Any -- sensing_report? / child_update := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYKpiReporting
PHYKpiReporting -- comm_ok sensing_qos_ok c_report <= D_report sync: phy_kpi_report! update: PHYState := PHYNormal, c_report := 0 --> PHYNormal

PHYKpiReporting -- !comm_ok sensing_qos_ok c_report <= D_report sync: phy_kpi_report! update: PHYState := PHYCommunicationDegraded, degradation_flag := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYCommunicationDegraded
PHYKpiReporting -- comm_ok !sensing_qos_ok c_report <= D_report sync: phy_kpi_report! update: PHYState := PHYSensingDegraded, degradation_flag := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYSensingDegraded
PHYKpiReporting -- !comm_ok !sensing_qos_ok c_report <= D_report sync: phy_kpi_report! update: PHYState := PHYJointDegraded, degradation_flag := true, c_report := 0 --> PHYJointDegraded
Any -- recovery_cmd? / PHYState := PHYRecovery --> PHYRecovery

transitions.guard: ChannelClass == OUTAGE || BeamClass == FAILED || SensingState == SensingFailure
transitions.statement: Any -- ChannelClass == OUTAGE || BeamClass == FAILED || SensingState == SensingFailure sync: phy_failure! update: PHYState := PHYFailure --> PHYFailure
Any -- waveform_config? / c_sig := 0 --> SignalReconfiguring
Any -- pilot_config? / c_sig := 0 --> SignalReconfiguring
Any -- payload_sensing_config? / c_sig := 0 --> SignalReconfiguring
SignalReconfiguring -- c_sig <= D_sig sync: signal_report! update: SignalClass := RECONFIGURING, c_sig := 0 --> SignalNominal

transitions.guard: PilotDensityClass == OK BLERClass == OK DRTClass == OK
transitions.statement: SignalNominal -- PilotDensityClass == OK BLERClass == OK DRTClass == OK sync: signal_report! update: SignalClass := PILOT_BASED, c_sig := 0 --> PilotBasedSensing
PilotBasedSensing -- PilotDensityClass == LOW PayloadSenseClass != FAILED sync: signal_report! update: SignalClass := PAYLOAD_ASSISTED, c_sig := 0 --> PayloadAssistedSensing

transitions.guard: BLERClass in HIGH, CRITICAL || DRTClass == BAD || PayloadSenseClass == FAILED
transitions.statement: Any -- BLERClass in HIGH, CRITICAL || DRTClass == BAD || PayloadSenseClass == FAILED sync: signal_report! update: SignalClass := LIMITED, signal_degraded_flag := true, c_sig := 0 --> SignalLimited
SignalLimited -- waveform_config? / c_sig := 0 --> SignalReconfiguring
Idle -- channel_report? / input_changed := true, c_sense := 0 --> SensingEvaluating
Idle -- signal_report? / input_changed := true, c_sense := 0 --> SensingEvaluating
Idle -- beam_report? / input_changed := true, c_sense := 0 --> SensingEvaluating
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == SensingQoSOk sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := SensingQoSOk, sensing_degraded_flag := false, c_sense := 0 --> SensingQoSOk
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == ProbabilityLimited sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := ProbabilityLimited, sensing_degraded_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> ProbabilityLimited
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == FalseAlarmLimited sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := FalseAlarmLimited, sensing_degraded_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> FalseAlarmLimited
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == AccuracyLimited sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := AccuracyLimited, sensing_degraded_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> AccuracyLimited
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == FreshnessLimited sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := FreshnessLimited, sensing_degraded_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> FreshnessLimited
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == CoverageLimited sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := CoverageLimited, sensing_degraded_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> CoverageLimited
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == CapacityLimited sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := CapacityLimited, sensing_degraded_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> CapacityLimited
SensingEvaluating -- guard: SensingState' == SensingFailure sync: sensing_report! update: SensingState := SensingFailure, sensing_failure_flag := true, c_sense := 0 --> SensingFailure

c_sense.meaning: время вычисления sensing state из входных классов

c_ssb.reset: вход в BeamSearch или команда ssb_burst_config?

statements: TickWait -- c_env <= T_meas + J_meas / measure_tick! --> TickWait
update: estimator classes are refreshed before measure_tick!
extra_ssb_cmd! and new_beam_confirmed! under admissible configs.
BlockageClass and emits target_detected! when a target is visible.

extractor.note: The extractor derives article structure, channels, class sets, queries, composition formulas, X_disc, clocks, invariants, automata/environment sketches, and assume/guarantee evidence from LaTeX, then binds them to the canonical PHY IR.

sections.title: Измерительный слой, конфигурация и конечные классы

invariants: A_PHY = A_CH || A_SIG || A_BM || A_SQ || A_PH
guards use finite class variables, not continuous PHY metrics
report/event channels are broadcast; command channels are handshake
bounded deadlines are checked by observers
limitations: base TA model does not prove radio-physical probabilities
base TA model does not optimize Pi_PHY
counterexamples may be physical scenarios or abstraction artifacts
parameter synthesis is out of scope for this MCP layer

properties.interpretation: normal state implies both aggregate booleans are ok
properties.name: aggregation_consistency

properties.interpretation: channel classifier has at most one enabled result
properties.name: ch_determinism

properties.interpretation: sensing classifier has at most one enabled result
properties.name: sq_determinism

properties.interpretation: beam recovery never exceeds its invariant
properties.name: bm_recover_invariant

properties.interpretation: A_CH contract violation is absent under assumptions
properties.name: contract_ch

properties.interpretation: A_SIG contract violation is absent under assumptions
properties.name: contract_sig

properties.interpretation: A_BM contract violation is absent under assumptions
properties.name: contract_bm

properties.interpretation: A_SQ contract violation is absent under assumptions
properties.name: contract_sq

properties.interpretation: A_PH contract violation is absent under assumptions
properties.name: contract_ph

variables.name: W
variables.role: finite waveform selector; waveform values are not locations
